attributes.description: Browser — Insider Threat (NirSoft BrowsingHistoryView). Cross-browser surfing-history view that complements the Chromium-focused Hindsight dashboard. Top panel: cross-tool Browser Distribution donut — answers 'which browsers does this environment actually use?' across both NirSoft and Hindsight data. Below: ALL HISTORY hero, TYPED URLs (high-intent signal), FILE:// URLs (local-file access via browser), DOWNLOADS, FORM SUBMITS, and EXFIL CHANNELS (file-sharing / personal cloud / webmail / AI / job sites / canary tokens). All non-distribution panels filter to browser.source_tool : nirsoft_browsinghistoryview so they don't double-count Hindsight data.
